title: Validate Experiment Cohort Targeting Logic
description: Test that the Trial Corner is NOT shown to users who start consumption within the first 5 minutes of their trial.
preconditions: User is not part of any other conflicting experiment.

steps.description: 2. Immediately start playing a video within 1-2 minutes of the trial starting.
3. Watch the video for at least 30 seconds.
4. Navigate around the app, specifically the homepage.
5. Check the header and profile/settings sections.

expected_result: The user does NOT see the 'Trial Mode' widget or any entry points to the Trial Corner. They see the standard trial management UI instead.
